---
output: html_document
---

# Introduction

# Genomics, Genes, and Genomes

# Array Technologies

# Gene sets and enrichment

# 2nd Gen Sequencing

# Sequence Analysis Fundamentals

# Sequence Analysis - RNA-Seq 1

# Sequence Analysis - RNA-Seq 2

# Genomic Variation and SNP Analysis

# Biological Data Formats

# Sequence Visualization

# Sequence Analysis - ChIP-Seq

# Biological Databases

# Replicability vs Reproducibility Strategies

# Computational Environment Management

# Computational Pipeline Strategies

# Single Cell Techniques

# Single Cell Analysis Part 1

# Single Cell Analysis Part 2

# Microbiome: 16S

# Microbiome: Metagenomics

# Proteomics

# Metabolomics

# Integrative Genomics

# (PART) Projects
